name: kokonut-file-upload
title: File Upload
author: kokonutUI
description: Validates, uploads, cancels, and reports progress for a dropped or selected file through a caller-supplied async transport.

changes: Replaced the built-in fake upload timer with a required caller-supplied async upload function, AbortSignal cancellation, and bounded progress reporting.
Replaced regular-expression MIME matching with literal MIME, wildcard MIME, and extension matching; bounded invalid size and progress inputs.
Added a persistent completed state, visible errors, cancellable cleanup, unique SVG mask IDs, live progress, and semantic busy and group states.
Stopped all SMIL, CSS, and Motion movement under reduced motion, increased touch targets, and gated decorative hover movement.
Changed the application utility alias to the bundled relative helper and normalized formatting while preserving the upstream upload illustrations and ring geometry.
Normalized formatting and line endings without changing behavior.

modifications.change: Preserved the upstream visual treatment while replacing simulated behavior with a real async transport contract, cancellation, strict validation, completed and error states, unique SVG IDs, and complete motion and input accessibility.
modifications.reason: A reusable upload component must never claim success from a timer; it needs caller-owned transport, progress, cancellation, validation, and deterministic cleanup.
Match the source batch formatting without changing the copied helper.
